title: Eosinophilic Esophagitis (EoE)
subtitle: Understanding and managing eosinophilic esophagitis
description: Clear, evidence-based information about eosinophilic esophagitis (EoE) — symptoms, diagnosis, treatment options, and when to seek help. Created by a Canadian gastroenterologist.

Updated ACG Clinical Guideline for EoE
